_comment: INSReverseResolver V2-bound instance, deployed to Igra L2 mainnet on 2026-05-02. Same contract code as the V1-bound instance — RR's `registry` is immutable, so V2 needs a fresh deploy. RR has no owner, no admin functions — pure user-controlled primary-name mapping per address.
deployer_status: QUARANTINED — same shared deployer as the V2 Marketplace; both deployed in one session, drained, key quarantined to ~insdapp/.foundry-keys/_quarantine/
owner_kind: (no owner — RR is fully decentralised, anyone can setPrimary on tokens they own)

rollout_status.note: V2 NFT holders' setPrimary button on /domains routes here automatically based on registryVersion. V1 NFT holders continue using the V1 RR (0x1bbd46aec...d931).
